creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
pvm uses fortran for several of it's examples. Build errors in those
	examples will be ignored, but installation fails because of missing
	files.

Fix: Re-add USE_FORTRAN to the port's Makefile:



Regards,
Christoph--5rRYsPcAS7tVmRLtDJ8mZJYx5NvPFEDGDh47PflyWc4OdjJL
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile	(revision 337881)
+++ Makefile	(working copy)
@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@
 OPTIONS_SUB=	yes
 X11_USE=	XORG=x11,xaw,xt
 
+USE_FORTRAN=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/pvm3
How-To-Repeat: 	actually try to install net/pvm, e.g. when upgrading pvm-3.4.6_2 to
	pvm-3.4.6_3
